productDisplayName: Scullers Men Navy Blue Striped T-shirt
description: Style NoteLook stylish in this striped polo neck T-shirt from scullers. The bold colour stripes gives it a really fresh feel, while the ribbed hem sits snug around your waist. Pair it with denims or chinos and floaters for a careful yet carefree look.Product DetailsBlue, black and white striped polo neck T-shirt, has short sleeves, chest buttoned placket, branding embroidered on the left chest and a vented hemMaterial and Care100% cottonWash inside outDo not attempt to remove stains by spot washingSteam ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 6' and shoulder 18") is wearing a size M
